allow: PowerShell($fw = \(& flutter --version\) -join "`n"; $root = \(Get-Command flutter\).Source | Split-Path | Split-Path; $f = Join-Path $root "packages\\flutter\\lib\\src\\widgets\\framework.dart"; Write-Output "root=$root exists=$\(Test-Path $f\)"; if \(Test-Path $f\) { Get-Content $f | Select-Object -Skip 6259 -First 24 })
